• Renders audio visualizations on layered 2D and 3D canvas elements.
  • Supports audio input from local files, microphones, or WebSocket streams.
  • Includes adjustable global settings and switchable visualizer presets with per-visualizer controls.
    const CONFIG = initializeConfig();
    analyser.getByteFrequencyData(audioData);

microViz is a browser-based audio visualization tool with separate 2D overlay and 3D background rendering layers. It supports multiple audio sources including local files, microphone input, and WebSocket streams with configurable analysis parameters. Users can switch between visualizer presets, adjust per-visualizer settings, and control playback via a dynamic settings panel.
